name: Thai Salmon Parcels
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the lime zest and juice, garlic, spring onion, ginger, and coriander.
2. Melt the butter.
3. Lay out 1 sheet of filo pastry and brush with butter. Lay a second sheet on top and brush with more butter.
4. Place a salmon fillet about 2-3 inches from the short side of the pastry, season to taste, and spread half of the lime mixture on top.
5. Fold the short end of the pastry over the salmon, then fold in the two long sides. Fold the salmon over twice more.
6. Cut off the remaining pastry.
7. Repeat with the other fillet.
8. Place the parcels on a well-greased baking sheet and brush with the remaining butter just before baking.
9. Cook at gas mark 5 for 20-25 minutes, until brown and crispy.
